/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/src/config_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/src/platform_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/src/system_diag.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bagheera_engine.dir/src/system_io.cpp.o -o bagheera_engine
